ddls:
CREATE TABLE "government_revenues" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue record */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entity (e.g., country, state) where the revenue is recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the revenue data */,
  "national_revenue" REAL /* National government revenue for the given year */,
  "state_revenue" REAL /* State government revenue for the given year */,
  "local_revenue" REAL /* Local government revenue for the given year */,
  "revenue_type" TEXT /* Type of revenue (e.g., tax, non-tax) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the entity for the given year */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the entity for the given year */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate for the given year */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate for the given year (if applicable for international entities) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_government_revenues_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity (e.g., United States) */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., country, state) */,
  "parent_entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent entity (e.g., state's parent is the country) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the entity */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the entity */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the entity in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_parent_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the revenue source (e.g., Income Tax, Sales Tax) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the revenue source (e.g., tax, fee, grant) */,
  "level_of_government" TEXT /* Level of government (e.g., national, state, local) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the revenue source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revenue source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revenue source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue detail */,
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the revenue record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the revenue source */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of revenue for the given source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revenue detail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revenue detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_details_revenue_id FOREIGN KEY ("revenue_id") REFERENCES government_revenues ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_details_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES revenue_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the revenue record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the revenue data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the revenue data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_revenue_id FOREIGN KEY ("revenue_id") REFERENCES government_revenues ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy document */,
  "document_title" TEXT /* Title of the policy document */,
  "document_year" INTEGER /* Year the policy document was published */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the policy document (e.g., fiscal policy, budget proposal) */,
  "document_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the policy document */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the policy document */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entity the document is related to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_documents_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)
